title: RStack builder contract (builder.json)
description: The contract a builder writes at .rstack/runs/<run_id>/tasks/<task_id>/builder.json. Derived from validateBuilderContract / validateBuilderCompleteness in src/core/harness/contracts.js — required fields and status enum match the code exactly. The harness is a tolerant reader: unknown fields are allowed and preserved.

task_id.description: Task this contract belongs to. Must equal the claimed task id — sdlc_validate FAILs builder_task_id_matches otherwise.

status.description: BUILDER_STATUSES. FAIL/BLOCKED are valid contracts that can never pass validation (builder_reported_not_pass).

summary.description: What was done. Passing contracts (PASS / DONE_WITH_CONCERNS) must carry at least 10 meaningful characters (builder_summary_meaningful).

files_modified.description: Project-relative paths the builder touched. Checked for existence by the files_modified_exist validator check.

tests_run.description: Commands run, or 'SKIPPED: <reason>' entries. Passing contracts must include at least one meaningful entry (builder_tests_run_has_evidence).

risks.description: Known risks. Required to be present and an array; content is free-form.

next_steps.description: Follow-up work. Required to be present and an array; content is free-form.

agent.description: Optional executor identity; defaults to 'builder' when absent.

harness.description: Optional producer identity (#72). Absent on legacy contracts — review independence cannot verify an identity that was never recorded.

work_done.description: At least 10 meaningful characters on passing contracts.

evidence.description: Proof paths or commands; at least one meaningful entry on passing contracts.

stage_summaries.description: One entry per canonical stage the task targets. Passing contracts must cover every expected stage id and use only known stage ids.

execution.description: Optional v2 telemetry block; when present it must be an object (builder_v2_execution_is_object). tools_used, when present, must be an array.

cost.description: Optional v2 telemetry block. estimated_usd / actual_usd, when present, must be numeric (builder_v2_cost_values_are_numeric).

context.description: Optional v2 telemetry block; when present it must be an object.

routing.description: Optional v2 telemetry block; recorded, not extracted.
